raw_sql:
SELECT 
    model_category,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
    MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
    MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_26
WHERE purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC;
template:
SELECT 
    model_category,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
    MIN(cost) AS min_cost,
    MAX(cost) AS max_cost
FROM flag_26
WHERE purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY model_category
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC;

predicates: ((purchased_on IS NOT NULL) AND (warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cost < 2000 THEN '< $2000'
        WHEN cost < 3000 THEN '$2000-$3000'
        WHEN cost < 4000 THEN '$3000-$4000'
        WHEN cost >= 4000 THEN '>= $4000'
    END AS cost_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS min_warranty_years,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS max_warranty_years
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_cost;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost >= ?n THEN ?s
    END AS cost_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
    ROUND(MIN(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS min_warranty_years,
    ROUND(MAX(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS max_warranty_years
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = ?s
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_cost;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    department,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS avg_warranty_years,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cost >= 4000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_cost_count,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN cost >= 4000 THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25 END)::numeric, 2) AS high_cost_warranty_years
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC;
template:

    department,

    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)::numeric, ?n) AS avg_warranty_years,
    SUM(CASE WHEN cost >= ?n THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS high_cost_count,
    ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN cost >= ?n THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n END)::numeric, ?n) AS high_cost_warranty_years
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = ?s
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ci AS model,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 365.25)::numeric, 2) AS avg_warranty_years
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5
ORDER BY avg_cost DESC
LIMIT 20;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cost < 2000 THEN '< $2000'
        WHEN cost < 3000 THEN '$2000-$3000'
        WHEN cost < 4000 THEN '$3000-$4000'
        WHEN cost >= 4000 THEN '>= $4000'
    END AS cost_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS avg_days_warranty_from_purchase,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - sys_updated_on)) / 86400))::int AS avg_days_warranty_remaining_at_update,
    SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < purchased_on THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warranty_already_expired_at_purchase,
    SUM(CASE WHEN warranty_expiration < sys_updated_on THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warranty_expired_at_update
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_days_warranty_from_purchase;

FROM flag_26

  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_days_warranty_from_purchase;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('quarter', purchased_on) AS purchase_quarter,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS avg_warranty_days
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY purchase_quarter
ORDER BY purchase_quarter;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(AVG(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS avg_cost_times_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS stddev_cost_times_days,
    ROUND(CORR(cost, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400)::numeric, 4) AS correlation,
    MIN(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400)::int AS min_product,
    MAX(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400)::int AS max_product
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    cost,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400) AS warranty_days,
    ROUND(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400) AS product,
    ROUND((cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400) / cost::numeric, 2) AS product_div_cost
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY cost
LIMIT 30;
template:

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(REGR_SLOPE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400, cost)::numeric, 6) AS slope,
    ROUND(REGR_INTERCEPT(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400, cost)::numeric, 4) AS intercept,
    ROUND(REGR_R2(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400, cost)::numeric, 6) AS r_squared,
    COUNT(*) AS n
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL;

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 + 0.195699 * cost)::numeric, 2) AS computed_constant,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY computed_constant
ORDER BY computed_constant
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT 
    ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n + ?n * cost)::numeric, ?n) AS computed_constant,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = ?s
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY computed_constant
ORDER BY computed_constant
LIMIT ?n;

predicates: ((purchased_on IS NOT NULL) AND (warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AND (model_category = 'Computer'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cost < 2000 THEN '< $2000'
        WHEN cost < 3000 THEN '$2000-$3000'
        WHEN cost < 4000 THEN '$3000-$4000'
        WHEN cost >= 4000 THEN '>= $4000'
    END AS cost_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS actual_warranty_days,
    730 AS baseline_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(730 - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int AS warranty_gap_days,
    ROUND(AVG((730 - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400) * cost / 730))::int AS cost_weighted_gap
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_cost;
template:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN cost >= ?n THEN ?s
    END AS cost_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(cost)) AS avg_cost,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n))::int AS actual_warranty_days,
    ?n AS baseline_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(?n - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n))::int AS warranty_gap_days,
    ROUND(AVG((?n - EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n) * cost / ?n))::int AS cost_weighted_gap
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = ?s
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY cost_bucket
ORDER BY avg_cost;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (cost < 2000) THEN '< $2000'::text WHEN (cost < 3000) THEN '$2000-$3000'::text WHEN (cost < 4000) THEN '$3000-$4000'::text WHEN (cost >= 4000) THEN '>= $4000'::text ELSE NULL::text END

predicates: ((purchased_on IS NOT NULL) AND (warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AND (model_category = 'Computer'::text))

raw_sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(cost)) AS total_computer_cost,
    ROUND(SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 730)) AS warranty_adjusted_value,
    ROUND(SUM(cost) - SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 730)) AS total_underprotected_value,
    ROUND(100.0 * (1 - SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400 / 730) / SUM(cost))::numeric, 1) AS pct_value_underprotected,
    -- Compare to other categories
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int 
     FROM flag_26 
     WHERE model_category != 'Computer' AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AS other_categories_avg_warranty_days,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / 86400))::int 
     FROM flag_26 
     WHERE model_category = 'Computer' AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AS computer_avg_warranty_days
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = 'Computer'
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL;
template:
SELECT 
    ROUND(SUM(cost)) AS total_computer_cost,
    ROUND(SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)) AS warranty_adjusted_value,
    ROUND(SUM(cost) - SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n)) AS total_underprotected_value,
    ROUND(?n * (?n - SUM(cost * EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n / ?n) / SUM(cost))::numeric, ?n) AS pct_value_underprotected,
    -- Compare to other categories
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n))::int 
     FROM flag_26 
     WHERE model_category != ?s AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AS other_categories_avg_warranty_days,
    (SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (warranty_expiration - purchased_on)) / ?n))::int 
     FROM flag_26 
     WHERE model_category = ?s AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AS computer_avg_warranty_days
FROM flag_26
WHERE model_category = ?s
  AND purchased_on IS NOT NULL AND warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL;

predicates: ((purchased_on IS NOT NULL) AND (warranty_expiration IS NOT NULL) AND (model_category <> 'Computer'::text))
